RCW Pension Crosswalk

Washington State retirement systems mapped to their governing RCW chapters and sections, over the complete RCW. Cites link to the official code.

Start with a cite to scope the search: 41.50 payment finds "payment" within chapter 41.50; 41.50 alone lists the whole chapter. Tags filter with #, e.g. #Disability Offset.

Loading RCW corpus…

Full code

Pension semantics mirror PENSION_MAP in lib/kits/wsl-core.js (mehrlander/web-tools); RCW hierarchy and captions from the 2025 RCW archive corpus (rcw/rcw-full.json). Self-contained: works saved locally, offline (links require a connection).
